---
title: "[Day] — [Topic]"
subtitle: "[Date]"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: false
editor: source
---

::: callout-note
## Today's plan
- [ ] [Goal 1]
- [ ] [Goal 2]
- [ ] [Goal 3]
:::

## Before class

- Read: [textbook section]
- Have ready: [data file URL, etc.]

## Outline

### 1. [Section heading] (~15 min)

[Concept exposition or motivating example.]

```{r}
#| eval: false
# Live-coded example
```

### 2. [Section heading] (~25 min)

[Hands-on practice — students follow along.]

```{r}
#| eval: false
# Example to walk through
```

### 3. In-class activity (~20 min)

[Brief description. If a separate handout, link it.]

[Activity link or inline problems]

### 4. Wrap-up (~5 min)

- [Key takeaway 1]
- [Key takeaway 2]
- Preview tomorrow

## Resources

- [Slides PDF]
- [In-class code .R file]
- [Activity handout]

## After class

- Due tomorrow: [reading, assignment]
- Optional: [supplementary reading or practice]
